---
id: execute-device-trait
title: "控制设备 / 设备更换房间 / 设备改名"
description: "通过 trait 执行设备控制，包括："
sidebar_label: "控制设备 / 设备更换房间 / 设备改名"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"控制设备 / 设备更换房间 / 设备改名"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/trait/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



通过 trait 执行设备控制，包括：
- 控制设备属性（如开关、温度等）
- 设备更换房间（functionCode=EndpointLabel, traitCode=EndpointRoom）
- 设备改名（functionCode=EndpointLabel, traitCode=EndpointName）


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","value"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：\n- Output（开关控制）\n- EndpointLabel（设备改名/更换房间）\n"},"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"属性编码，如：\n- OnOff（开关）\n- EndpointRoom（设备所在房间）\n- EndpointName（设备名称）\n"},"value":{"description":"要设置的值（推荐按同级 parameter.type 选择值类型）","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"TraitExecuteItem"}}},"title":"TraitExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeOnOff":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","value":true}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功（data 中返回执行失败的条目）","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"data集合元素为执行失败的数据","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCode","code","message"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer"},"functionCode":{"type":"string"},"traitCode":{"type":"string"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"错误码"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"错误信息"}},"title":"TraitExecuteResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"ExecuteTraitResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000009","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","code":1103,"message":"device offline"}]},"title":"TraitExecuteResponse"},"examples":{"partialFailed":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteTraitResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf7","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","code":1103,"message":"device offline"}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request Parameter Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx cannot be empty"},"description":"Error response. >
